_comment: Copy to acm.config.json (or point ACM_CONFIG at this file). Shape == backend/context_profiles.py Profile. Flip 'enabled' to turn a technique on. This example mirrors the 'long_chat' preset.

visual_method._comment: Gateway-only: rasterise large tool outputs into a PNG the model reads as an image, keeping URLs/citations as text. Independent of the Profile keys above.
